values.title: Summit Auto Care
values.hero_title: Honest Auto Repair You Can Trust
values.hero_description: Summit Auto Care provides reliable, transparent auto repair and maintenance services for all makes and models. Our ASE-certified technicians use the latest diagnostic equipment to get you back on the road safely.
values.cta_title: Need a Repair? Book Online Today
values.cta_description: Schedule your appointment online and skip the wait. We offer free estimates, shuttle service, and a comfortable waiting area with Wi-Fi and complimentary coffee.

values.title: Oil Change & Filter
values.body:
Regular oil changes are the single most important thing you can do to extend the life of your engine. Our technicians use premium synthetic and conventional oils and OEM-spec filters for every service.

What's Included

  • Drain and replace engine oil (conventional or synthetic)
  • Replace oil filter with OEM-spec filter
  • Inspect and top off all fluids
  • Check tire pressure and condition
  • Multi-point vehicle inspection

Oil Types Available

We stock conventional, synthetic blend, full synthetic, and high-mileage formulations from Mobil 1, Valvoline, and Pennzoil.
values.summary: Conventional and synthetic oil changes with multi-point inspection.

values.title: Brake Repair & Replacement
values.body:
Your brakes are your vehicle's most critical safety system. Our technicians perform thorough brake inspections and use premium ceramic pads and quality rotors to restore your stopping power.

Brake Services

  • Brake pad replacement (ceramic or semi-metallic)
  • Rotor resurfacing or replacement
  • Brake fluid flush
  • Caliper inspection and repair
  • Anti-lock brake system (ABS) diagnostics

Warning Signs

Squealing, grinding, vibration when braking, or a soft brake pedal all indicate it's time for a brake inspection. Don't delay -- brake problems only get more expensive over time.
values.summary: Complete brake inspection, pad replacement, rotor service, and ABS diagnostics.

image.alt: Close-up of a vehicle brake assembly
image.title: Brake Repair Service

values.title: Engine Diagnostics
values.body:
That check engine light could mean a dozen different things. Our advanced diagnostic equipment reads fault codes, monitors live data, and pinpoints the exact issue so we fix the right problem the first time.

Diagnostic Capabilities

  • OBD-II fault code reading and interpretation
  • Live data stream analysis
  • Emission system diagnostics
  • Electrical system testing
  • Computer module programming and updates
values.summary: Advanced computer diagnostics for check engine lights and performance issues.

image.alt: Diagnostic equipment connected to vehicle engine
image.title: Engine Diagnostics

values.title: Mike Sullivan
values.body:
Mike founded Summit Auto Care in 1994 with a simple mission: provide honest, quality auto repair at fair prices. A second-generation mechanic, Mike learned the trade from his father and has stayed current with the latest automotive technologies through continuous training.

When he's not under a hood, Mike coaches youth baseball and volunteers with the local Habitat for Humanity chapter.

photo.alt: Mike Sullivan, owner and master technician
photo.title: Mike Sullivan

values.title: Rachel Torres
values.body:
Rachel joined Summit in 2015 after earning her automotive technology degree from UTI. She quickly distinguished herself with her diagnostic skills and attention to detail. Rachel specializes in European vehicles and is one of the few female ASE-certified master technicians in the region.

She regularly attends manufacturer training programs and mentors apprentice technicians at the shop.

values.title: James Wright
values.body:
James brings 20 years of experience specializing in transmissions and drivetrain systems. Before joining Summit, he worked at a dealership transmission center where he rebuilt thousands of automatic and manual transmissions.

James is known for his ability to diagnose complex drivetrain issues that other shops miss. His rebuild work carries our extended warranty with confidence.

values.title: Synthetic Oil Change Special
values.body: Save on a full synthetic oil change including a premium filter and our comprehensive multi-point inspection. Keep your engine running smoothly with the best protection available.
values.terms: Valid for full synthetic oil change only. One coupon per vehicle per visit. Cannot be combined with other offers. Must present coupon at time of service.

values.title: Brake Service Package
values.body: Get premium ceramic brake pads and new rotors at a discounted package price. Includes a free brake inspection and road test to ensure everything is working perfectly.
values.terms: Applies to brake pad and rotor replacement on one or both axles. Includes ceramic pads and standard rotors. Performance upgrades available at additional cost. Cannot be combined with other offers.

values.title: New Customer Welcome Discount
values.body: First time at Summit Auto Care? Welcome! Enjoy 15% off any service on your first visit. We're confident you'll see the Summit difference and become a customer for life.
values.terms: Valid for new customers only. Maximum discount of $150. Applies to labor charges. Cannot be combined with other offers or applied to tires or parts-only purchases.

values.title: About Summit Auto Care
values.body:
Summit Auto Care has been the community's trusted auto repair shop since 1994. Founded by Mike Sullivan, our family-owned business has grown through word-of-mouth referrals from satisfied customers who appreciate our honest approach to vehicle maintenance and repair.

Our Promise

We believe in transparent pricing, honest diagnoses, and quality workmanship. We'll never recommend a repair you don't need, and we'll always explain the options so you can make an informed decision. Every repair comes with our satisfaction guarantee.

Our Facility

Our 8-bay shop is equipped with the latest diagnostic technology including Hunter alignment systems, Snap-on scan tools, and manufacturer-specific programming equipment. We service all makes and models, from daily drivers to European luxury vehicles.

values.title: Contact Us
values.body:
Have a question about your vehicle or want to schedule an appointment? Give us a call or stop by. Walk-ins are welcome for quick services like oil changes and inspections.

Shop Hours

Monday - Friday: 7:30 AM - 5:30 PM
Saturday: 8:00 AM - 1:00 PM
Sunday: Closed
